trigger: 新婚之夜，试图用身体掌控女主，却被女主当成完成任务般无视与催促。

appearance_delta.face: 原本带有隐秘欲望的面容因被羞辱而转为冷笑与僵硬
appearance_delta.body: 动作带有侵略性，但气势被女主的冷漠削弱
appearance_delta.hair: 束发稍微松动，不如朝堂上那般严丝合缝
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 眼神中交织着情欲与被无视的屈辱感

costume_override.outfit: 华贵的传统中式婚服，领口可能因圆房而略微解开

visual_reference: 1boy, ancient chinese handsome groom, jade-like face, amber eyes, wearing luxurious red traditional chinese wedding robes with dark gold embroidery, slightly messy collar, frustrated and mocking smile, suppressed desire, dim candlelight background in a bridal chamber, masterpiece, 8k resolution
emotional_tone: 欲望交织着屈辱与不甘
